text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Captivated by Agnes Tachyon's performance at
the Osaka Hai, many fans have come today to
cheer her on.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text: Agnes Tachyon is running in the race today!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: I might've heard of that name. Who is that again?

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
She's a strange one! But for some reason, I can't
help but want to root for her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text: Well well, there's quite a few fans present.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
Yes. It's an excellent opportunity to further
research the significance of crowd support.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
We're here at a GI race with the full support of
the crowd! All procedures are in place!
Heh-heh-heh!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Tachyon
text_block_list.text:
How far can we go today? My body is tingling
with anticipation!
